name: crisis-hotlines
_note: mental-health.crisis-hotlines returns AUTHORITATIVE, REAL crisis contact data (988 Suicide & Crisis Lifeline + verified national hotline registries — source-attributed, NOT synthesized). It is total: any unknown/garbage country degrades to the findahelpline.com fallback with available:false, still ok:true (never throws — wrapped in try/catch). This is the one safety-critical surface; the data must never be fabricated or omitted. Lens-action domain (registerLensAction) — not assassin-enumerable via runMacro.
